options.name: --dll
options.description: The path to the dll to generate documentation for

options.name: --use-xml-docs
options.description: Should we try to load the xml docs, (you probably want to enable this).

options.name: --md-output
options.description: The path where the markdown files will be written to.

options.name: --maml-file
options.description: Output location for the maml file (powershell docs format)
